purpose: Capture and qualify potential property buyers from authorised sources into a governed master buyer database. Outreach is excluded unless separately requested and approved.

quarantined_or_rejected_claims.reason: No software or data pipeline can be certified as zero-error without bounded tests and production evidence.
The available source denominator and Apollo export entitlement do not prove this volume.
No representative labelled validation set or provider evidence was supplied.

quarantined_or_rejected_claims.claim: Fixed 651 AUD total cost and current provider pricing
quarantined_or_rejected_claims.reason: Pricing, exchange rates, credits, APIs and provider terms are volatile and require current official verification plus owner approval.

quarantined_or_rejected_claims.claim: One day build and seven day execution
quarantined_or_rejected_claims.reason: Depends on export permissions, data volume, provider processing, runtime and review gates.

quarantined_or_rejected_claims.claim: Guessing personal emails from names and company domains
quarantined_or_rejected_claims.reason: A generated address does not prove identity, authority, consent, deliverability or lawful use and may create privacy and spam risk.

prohibited_default_actions: Generate or infer personal email addresses from names and domains for live use.
Scrape Click Data or bypass platform authentication, export restrictions, rate limits or terms.
Purchase verification credits or upload personal data to a provider without owner approval and privacy review.
Send outreach, marketing or bulk email without a separate approved outreach workflow, lawful basis and suppression controls.
Treat email validation as proof that a person is a qualified buyer or authorised decision-maker.
pattern_engine_policy: DISABLED_QUARANTINED_RESEARCH_ONLY. It may be evaluated on synthetic or consented test data but must not create live contact records without legal, provider-terms, identity and owner approval gates.
deployment_gates: current official Apollo and verification-provider terms and pricing
approved export entitlement and source volume
privacy impact and Australian Spam Act review
secure data processor agreement and retention controls
measured precision recall bounce and misidentification rates
